rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §28.0251 governs issuance of high school diplomas to certain veterans. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 28.0251. HIGH SCHOOL DIPLOMA FOR CERTAIN VETERANS.
_note: No relationship between proposed property-tax exemption change and this education statute; scanned for completeness.
